mapper.select: SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ , A.NMAX_SEQ AS NLVL_MST_SEQ , B.SFCLT_TYPE , C.SFCLT_CMD , C.NPRIORITY FROM MST.TB_LVL_BAS A , MST.TB_INTGRM_FCLT_MST B , MST.TB_INTGRM_FCLT_CMD_MST C WHERE A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.SSVC_GROUP_CD = #{ssvcGroupCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND A.SSVC_OBJ_CD = #{ssvcObjCd, jdbcType=CHAR} AND B.NLVL_BAS_SEQ = A.NLVL_BAS_SEQ AND C.SFCLT_TYPE = B.SFCLT_TYPE AND C.SUSE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY C.NPRIORITY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_EXCPT_MST ( SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , NLVL_MST_SEQ , SEXCPT_CD , SEXCPT_RSN , NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , NIP_CHG_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , PIPMS_IP_PREFIX , SIPMS_IP_BLOCK , NIPMS_IP_BITMASK , PROUTING_IP_PREFIX , SROUTING_IP_BLOCK , NROUTING_IP_BITMASK , SROUTING_USE_YN , DCREATE_DT , SCREATE_ID , DMODIFY_DT , SMODIFY_ID ) SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , #{sexcpt_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{sexcpt_rsn, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_CHG_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX , A.SIPMS_IP_BLOCK , A.NIPMS_IP_BITMASK , A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX , A.SROUTING_IP_BLOCK , A.NROUTING_IP_BITMASK , A.SROUTING_USE_YN , SYSDATE , #{screateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , #{screateId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST A , ( SELECT A.SCOLLECT_DT , A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ , (CASE WHEN A.CASE1 > 1 AND A.CASE2 = 1 THEN 'PIPMS' -- ROUTING 장비 IP 범위가 더 작을 경우(분할) WHEN A.CASE2 > 1 AND A.CASE1 = 1 THEN 'PROUTING' -- IPMS IP 범위가 더 작을 경우(병합) WHEN A.CASE1 = 1 AND A.CASE2 = 1 THEN 'PIPMS' -- IP 범위 같을 경우 ELSE NULL END) AS SIP_PREFIX_GUBUN FROM ( SELECT A.SCOLLECT_DT , A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ , A.CASE1 , A.CASE2 FROM ( SELECT A.SCOLLECT_DT , A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ , COUNT(A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX) OVER(PARTITION BY A.SCOLLECT_DT, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX) AS CASE1 , COUNT(A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX) OVER(PARTITION BY A.SCOLLECT_DT, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX) AS CASE2 FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SCHANGE_YN = 'N' -- IP배정, IP할당 메뉴에서 변경이 일어난 건은 조회X AND (A.SCOLLECT_DT, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ) IN ( SELECT MAX(SCOLLECT_DT), NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND SCHANGE_YN = 'N' -- IP배정, IP할당 메뉴에서 변경이 일어난 건은 조회X AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN ( SELECT NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 ) GROUP BY NLVL_MST_SEQ ) ) A WHERE 1=1 AND A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ = #{nroutingChkMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} ) A WHERE 1=1 ) B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SCHANGE_YN = 'N' -- IP배정, IP할당 메뉴에서 변경이 일어난 건은 조회X AND (A.SCOLLECT_DT, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ) IN ( SELECT MAX(SCOLLECT_DT), NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND SCHANGE_YN = 'N' -- IP배정, IP할당 메뉴에서 변경이 일어난 건은 조회X AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN ( SELECT NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 ) GROUP BY NLVL_MST_SEQ) AND NVL(A.SDB_INTGRM_RSLT_CD, 'X') NOT IN ('DR0004', 'DR0002') AND (CASE WHEN B.SIP_PREFIX_GUBUN = 'PIPMS' THEN A.PIPMS_IP_PREFIX WHEN B.SIP_PREFIX_GUBUN = 'PROUTING' THEN A.PROUTING_IP_PREFIX END) = ((CASE WHEN B.SIP_PREFIX_GUBUN = 'PIPMS' THEN (SELECT PIPMS_IP_PREFIX FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE (SCOLLECT_DT, NLVL_MST_SEQ) IN ( SELECT MAX(SCOLLECT_DT), NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN ( SELECT NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 ) GROUP BY NLVL_MST_SEQ) AND NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ = #{nroutingChkMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}) WHEN B.SIP_PREFIX_GUBUN = 'PROUTING' THEN (SELECT PROUTING_IP_PREFIX FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE (SCOLLECT_DT, NLVL_MST_SEQ) IN ( SELECT MAX(SCOLLECT_DT), NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN ( SELECT NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 ) GROUP BY NLVL_MST_SEQ) AND NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ = #{nroutingChkMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}) END))
mapper.select: SELECT B.SEXCPT_NM , A.SEXCPT_RSN FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_EXCPT_MST A , MST.TB_INTGRM_EXCPT_CD B WHERE 1=1 AND NVL(A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ) = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND B.SEXCPT_CD(+) = A.SEXCPT_CD
mapper.update: UPDATE MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST B SET B.SCHANGE_YN = 'Y' , DMODIFY_DT = SYSDATE FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND (A.SCOLLECT_DT, A.NLVL_MST_SEQ) IN ( SELECT MAX(SCOLLECT_DT), NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_INTGRM_ROUTING_CHK_MST WHERE 1=1 AND NLVL_MST_SEQ IN ( SELECT NLVL_MST_SEQ FROM MST.TB_LVL_MST WHERE 1=1 ) GROUP BY NLVL_MST_SEQ) AND NVL(A.NIP_CHG_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ, A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ) = #{nipAssignMstSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND B.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ = A.NROUTING_CHK_MST_SEQ AND B.SCOLLECT_DT = A.SCOLLECT_DT
mapper.select: SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SOFFICECODE , A.SOFFICENAME , A.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS , A.SMODELNAME , A.SLLNUM , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , A.SSAID , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SCUSTNAME , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS_TYPE FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , B.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , B.SSUBSCMSTIP , B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , NVL(D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, '-') AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , C.SSVC_GROUP_CD , NVL(E.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , C.SSVC_OBJ_CD , NVL(F.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , B.SOFFICECODE , NVL(G.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SOFFICENAME , NVL(H.SSVC_MGROUP_NM, '-') AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM , NVL(I.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, '-') AS SSVC_LGROUP_NM , NVL(J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM, '-') AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , NVL(K.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM, '-') AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , NVL(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS, '-') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(B.SMODELNAME, '-') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(B.SLLNUM, '-') AS SLLNUM , NVL(B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION, '-') AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(B.SSAID, '-') AS SSAID , NVL(B.SCONNALIAS, '-') AS SCONNALIAS , NVL(B.SCUSTNAME, '-') AS SCUSTNAME , A.DMODIFY_DT , (CASE WHEN B.SSUBSCNEALIAS IS NOT NULL OR B.SSUBSCNEALIAS != '' THEN SUBSTRING(SPLIT_PART(B.SSUBSCNEALIAS, '-', 2), 1, 2) ELSE 'X' END) AS SSUBSCNEALIAS_TYPE FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_CD F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD H , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD I , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD J , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD K WHERE 1=1 AND B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AND C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND E.SLVL_CD(+) = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND F.SLVL_CD(+) = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD AND G.SLVL_CD(+) = B.SOFFICECODE AND H.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) = LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) AND I.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) = RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) AND J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) = B.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD AND K.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) = A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AND (B.SSUBSCMSTIP = #{sNextHop, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP = #{sNextHop, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT DESC ) A WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , A.SSVC_GROUP_CD , A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD , A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SOFFICECODE , A.SOFFICENAME , A.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , A.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.SSUBSCNEALIAS , A.SMODELNAME , A.SLLNUM , A.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , A.SSAID , A.SCONNALIAS , A.SCUSTNAME FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , J.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , NULL AS NLVL_MST_SEQ , K.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , K.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , B.OFFICESCODE AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , G.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , B.RSSOFFICESCODE AS SOFFICECODE , NVL(C.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SOFFICENAME , NVL(H.SSVC_MGROUP_NM, '-') AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM , NVL(I.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, '-') AS SSVC_LGROUP_NM , '-' AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , '- 'AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , NVL(A.SIP_HOST_NM, '-') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(A.SMODELNAME, '-') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(A.SLLNUM, '-') AS SLLNUM , '-' AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(A.SSAID, '-') AS SSAID , '-' AS SCONNALIAS , '-' AS SCUSTNAME FROM MST.TB_IP_HOST_MST A , BIF.TB_NE B , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD H , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD I , MST.TB_LVL_MST J , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD K WHERE 1=1 AND A.SIP_BLOCK = #{sNextHop, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.NESCODE(+) = A.SNESCODE AND G.SLVL_CD(+) = B.OFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = B.RSSOFFICESCODE AND H.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) = LEFT(NVL(A.SEX_SVC_CD, '999999'),6) AND I.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) = RIGHT(NVL(A.SEX_SVC_CD, '999999'),6) AND J.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND J.SSVC_OBJ_CD(+) = B.OFFICESCODE AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) = J.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND K.SLVL_CD(+) = J.SSVC_GROUP_CD ) A WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT count(1) as totalCount FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , B.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , B.SSUBSCMSTIP , B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP , A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , A.NLVL_MST_SEQ , C.SSVC_GROUP_CD , E.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , C.SSVC_OBJ_CD , F.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , B.SOFFICECODE , G.SLVL_NM AS SOFFICENAME , H.SSVC_MGROUP_NM , I.SSVC_LGROUP_NM , J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , K.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , B.SSUBSCNEALIAS , B.SMODELNAME , B.SLLNUM , B.SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , B.SSAID , B.SCONNALIAS , B.SCUSTNAME , A.DMODIFY_DT FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST A , MST.TB_IP_ALLOC_MST B , MST.TB_LVL_MST C , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD E , MST.TB_LVL_CD F , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD H , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD I , MST.TB_SVC_USE_TYPE_CD J , MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD K WHERE 1=1 AND B.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ = A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ AND C.NLVL_MST_SEQ = A.NLVL_MST_SEQ AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) = C.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND E.SLVL_CD(+) = C.SSVC_GROUP_CD AND F.SLVL_CD(+) = C.SSVC_OBJ_CD AND G.SLVL_CD(+) = B.SOFFICECODE AND H.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) = LEFT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) AND I.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) = RIGHT(A.SEX_SVC_CD,6) AND J.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD(+) = B.SSVC_USE_TYPE_CD AND K.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD(+) = A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD AND (B.SSUBSCMSTIP = #{sNextHop, jdbcType=VARCHAR} OR B.SSUBSCROUTERSERIALIP = #{sNextHop, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT DESC ) A WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT count(1) as totalCount FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ , A.NIP_ALLOC_MST_SEQ , J.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , NULL AS NLVL_MST_SEQ , K.SLVL_CD AS SSVC_GROUP_CD , K.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , B.OFFICESCODE AS SSVC_OBJ_CD , G.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , B.RSSOFFICESCODE AS SOFFICECODE , NVL(C.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SOFFICENAME , NVL(H.SSVC_MGROUP_NM, '-') AS SSVC_MGROUP_NM , NVL(I.SSVC_LGROUP_NM, '-') AS SSVC_LGROUP_NM , '-' AS SSVC_USE_TYPE_NM , '- 'AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , NVL(A.SIP_HOST_NM, '-') AS SSUBSCNEALIAS , NVL(A.SMODELNAME, '-') AS SMODELNAME , NVL(A.SLLNUM, '-') AS SLLNUM , '-' AS SSUBSCLGIPPORTDESCRIPTION , NVL(A.SSAID, '-') AS SSAID , '-' AS SCONNALIAS , '-' AS SCUSTNAME FROM MST.TB_IP_HOST_MST A , BIF.TB_NE B , MST.TB_LVL_CD G , MST.TB_LVL_CD C , MST.TB_SVC_MGROUP_CD H , MST.TB_SVC_LGROUP_CD I , MST.TB_LVL_MST J , MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD D , MST.TB_LVL_CD K WHERE 1=1 AND A.SIP_BLOCK = #{sNextHop, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.NESCODE(+) = A.SNESCODE AND G.SLVL_CD(+) = B.OFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = B.RSSOFFICESCODE AND H.SSVC_MGROUP_CD(+) = LEFT(NVL(A.SEX_SVC_CD, '999999'),6) AND I.SSVC_LGROUP_CD(+) = RIGHT(NVL(A.SEX_SVC_CD, '999999'),6) AND J.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = #{ssvcLineTypeCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND J.SSVC_OBJ_CD(+) = B.OFFICESCODE AND D.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD(+) = J.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD AND K.SLVL_CD(+) = J.SSVC_GROUP_CD ) A WHERE 1=1 AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP -- 인터페이스 시리얼 IP , A.SANEALIAS -- 자국_장비명 , A.SAMSTIP -- 자국_장비IP , A.SAIFNAME -- 자국_IF명 , A.SALOCATIONCODE -- 자국_시설코드 , A.SAOFFICESCODE -- 자국_수용국 , A.SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS -- 대국_장비명 , A.SZMSTIP -- 대국_장비IP , A.SZIFNAME -- 대국_IF명 , A.SZLOCATIONCODE -- 대국_시설코드 , A.SZOFFICESCODE -- 대국_수용국 , A.SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , A.SSAID -- SAID , A.SLLNUM -- LLNUM FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP -- 인터페이스 시리얼 IP , NVL(A.SANEALIAS, '-') AS SANEALIAS -- 자국_장비명 , NVL(A.SAMSTIP, '-') AS SAMSTIP -- 자국_장비IP , NVL(A.SAIFNAME, '-') AS SAIFNAME -- 자국_IF명 , NVL(A.SALOCATIONCODE, '-') AS SALOCATIONCODE -- 자국_시설코드 , NVL(A.SAOFFICESCODE, '-') AS SAOFFICESCODE -- 자국_수용국 , NVL(B.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SAOFFICESCODE_NM , NVL(A.SZNEALIAS, '-') AS SZNEALIAS -- 대국_장비명 , NVL(A.SZMSTIP, '-') AS SZMSTIP -- 대국_장비IP , NVL(A.SZIFNAME, '-') AS SZIFNAME -- 대국_IF명 , NVL(A.SZLOCATIONCODE, '-') AS SZLOCATIONCODE -- 대국_시설코드 , NVL(A.SZOFFICESCODE, '-') AS SZOFFICESCODE -- 대국_수용국 , NVL(C.SLVL_NM, '-') AS SZOFFICESCODE_NM , NVL(A.SCONNALIAS, '-') AS SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , NVL(A.SSAID, '-') AS SSAID -- SAID , NVL(A.SLLNUM, '-') AS SLLNUM -- LLNUM FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B -- 자국 수용국 , MST.TB_LVL_CD C -- 대국 수용국 WHERE 1=1 AND B.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SAOFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SZOFFICESCODE AND CAST(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP AS TEXT) = #{pipPrefix, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP -- 인터페이스 시리얼 IP , A.SANEALIAS -- 자국_장비명 , A.SAMSTIP -- 자국_장비IP , A.SAIFNAME -- 자국_IF명 , A.SALOCATIONCODE -- 자국_시설코드 , A.SAOFFICESCODE -- 자국_수용국 , B.SLVL_NM , A.SZNEALIAS -- 대국_장비명 , A.SZMSTIP -- 대국_장비IP , A.SZIFNAME -- 대국_IF명 , A.SZLOCATIONCODE -- 대국_시설코드 , A.SZOFFICESCODE -- 대국_수용국 , C.SLVL_NM , A.SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , A.SSAID -- SAID , A.SLLNUM -- LLNUM ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM =1

SELECT count(1) as totalCount FROM ( SELECT A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP -- 인터페이스 시리얼 IP , A.SANEALIAS -- 자국_장비명 , A.SAMSTIP -- 자국_장비IP , A.SAIFNAME -- 자국_IF명 , A.SALOCATIONCODE -- 자국_시설코드 , A.SAOFFICESCODE -- 자국_수용국 , B.SLVL_NM AS SAOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SZNEALIAS -- 대국_장비명 , A.SZMSTIP -- 대국_장비IP , A.SZIFNAME -- 대국_IF명 , A.SZLOCATIONCODE -- 대국_시설코드 , A.SZOFFICESCODE -- 대국_수용국 , C.SLVL_NM AS SZOFFICESCODE_NM , A.SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , A.SSAID -- SAID , A.SLLNUM -- LLNUM FROM MST.TB_IP_LINK_MST A , MST.TB_LVL_CD B -- 자국 수용국 , MST.TB_LVL_CD C -- 대국 수용국 WHERE 1=1 AND B.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SAOFFICESCODE AND C.SLVL_CD(+) = A.SZOFFICESCODE AND CAST(A.PIF_SERIAL_IP AS TEXT) = #{pipPrefix, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY A.NIP_LINK_MST_SEQ , A.PIF_SERIAL_IP -- 인터페이스 시리얼 IP , A.SANEALIAS -- 자국_장비명 , A.SAMSTIP -- 자국_장비IP , A.SAIFNAME -- 자국_IF명 , A.SALOCATIONCODE -- 자국_시설코드 , A.SAOFFICESCODE -- 자국_수용국 , B.SLVL_NM , A.SZNEALIAS -- 대국_장비명 , A.SZMSTIP -- 대국_장비IP , A.SZIFNAME -- 대국_IF명 , A.SZLOCATIONCODE -- 대국_시설코드 , A.SZOFFICESCODE -- 대국_수용국 , C.SLVL_NM , A.SCONNALIAS -- 수용회선명 , A.SSAID -- SAID , A.SLLNUM -- LLNUM ORDER BY A.DMODIFY_DT DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM =1
